summary: Single-prompt live canary scenarios for frequent attended and unattended iteration loops.

scenarios.name: canary-chorus-focus
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Design a single Chorus 1 concept anchored to the beat grid for Snowman and Star. Keep Snowman as the focal read and use Star as support. Do not rewrite the whole show.

scenarios.name: canary-composition-pass
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Use the perimeter props to frame the song while the centerpiece props take over the key reveals and choruses.

scenarios.name: canary-phrase-subtlety
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: In the Bridge, hold the breath before the phrase release and shape the lift with subtler within-phrase timing instead of filling the whole section evenly.
